---
title: "simulate_bias_field"
generated: true
description: "Simulate a smooth multiplicative intensity non-uniformity field."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.augment.synthesis`](../nitrix-augment-synthesis.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:simulate_bias_field -->
```python
simulate_bias_field(spatial_shape: Sequence[int], key: Array, *, max_std: float = 0.5, grid_fraction: float = 0.04, dtype: Optional[DTypeLike] = None) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:simulate_bias_field -->
Simulate a smooth multiplicative intensity non-uniformity field.

Draws a low-resolution Gaussian field, whose standard deviation is
itself drawn as $\sigma \sim U(0, \texttt{max\_std})$, on a
coarse grid of `round(shape * grid_fraction)` cells per axis (at
least 2), linearly upsamples it to `spatial_shape`, and
exponentiates the result.  The output is a smooth, strictly-positive
field with mean near 1: multiply an image by it to impose a realistic
low-frequency bias.  A `max_std` of 0 gives an all-ones (no-op)
field.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:simulate_bias_field -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `spatial_shape` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | Target shape of the simulated field, one entry per spatial axis. |
| `key` | `Array` | — | — | PRNG key; split internally to draw both the field's standard deviation and the coarse Gaussian field. |
| `max_std` | `float` | — | `0.5` | Upper bound of the uniform distribution from which the coarse field's standard deviation is drawn (in log-intensity units, prior to exponentiation). Larger values yield stronger bias. |
| `grid_fraction` | `float` | — | `0.04` | Fraction of each spatial extent used to size the coarse grid; the coarse grid has `round(shape * grid_fraction)` cells per axis (clamped to at least 2). Smaller values give a smoother, lower-frequency field. |
| `dtype` | `Optional[DTypeLike]` | — | `None` | Floating dtype of the output. Defaults to the x64-aware default float (`float64` when x64 is enabled, otherwise `float32`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`. Strictly-positive multiplicative field with shape `spatial_shape`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:simulate_bias_field -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
